error.signature: MissingPluginException(No implementation found for method getBatteryLevel on channel samples.flutter.dev/battery)

verdict.summary: Platform channel method invocation failed. Native side does not have a handler registered for the method channel, or the channel name is misspelled.

dead_ends.action: Add the channel handler in only one platform (e.g., Android but not iOS)
dead_ends.why_fails: Flutter apps run on multiple platforms; missing handler on any target platform causes runtime crash

dead_ends.action: Use hot restart to pick up platform channel changes
dead_ends.why_fails: Hot restart only restarts the Dart VM; native platform code changes require a full rebuild

workarounds.action: Verify channel name matches exactly between Dart and native code
Do a full stop and rebuild after any native code changes
workarounds.how: flutter clean && flutter run  // hot restart does NOT reload native platform code

workarounds.action: Use Pigeon or federated plugins for type-safe platform channels
workarounds.how: flutter pub add pigeon  // generates type-safe platform channel code from a schema
